allow: Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT category, name FROM svg_components ORDER BY category, name;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT count\(*\) FROM conversations; SELECT count\(*\) FROM sessions;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT conversation_id, count\(*\) as msg_count FROM sessions GROUP BY conversation_id ORDER BY msg_count DESC;")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['build','identifier','productName','bundle']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT id, frame_count, render_path FROM sessions LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT frame_count, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM sessions GROUP BY frame_count ORDER BY frame_count;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT id, created_at FROM conversations ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT conversation_id, COUNT\(*\) as turns FROM sessions GROUP BY conversation_id ORDER BY turns DESC;")
Bash(sqlite3 database.sqlite "SELECT id, title, created_at FROM conversations ORDER BY created_at DESC;")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('images count:', len\(d.get\('images',[]\)\)\);  print\('captions:', d.get\('captions',[]\)\); print\('notes?:', bool\(d.get\('notes'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./node_modules/@tiptap/react'\); console.log\('version:', require\('./node_modules/@tiptap/react/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('BubbleMenu:', typeof r.BubbleMenu\); console.log\('FloatingMenu:', typeof r.FloatingMenu\)")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./node_modules/@tiptap/react'\); console.log\('useEditor:', typeof r.useEditor\); console.log\('EditorContent:', typeof r.EditorContent\); console.log\('version:', require\('./node_modules/@tiptap/react/package.json'\).version\)")
